data.content: Improved agent model picker readability and searchability for large OpenCode lists: added buildModelLabelDisplayMap helper to strip shared prefixes with collision fallback, reused it in both searchable combobox and plain select paths, and expanded combobox matching keywords across raw/stripped/provider/model fields. Added regression tests for unique stripped labels and collision fallback in src/lib/__tests__/model-labels.test.ts. Quality gates: bun run lint (warnings only), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test (119 files, 1862 passed), NODE_ENV=production bun run build. Integrated on main and pushed to origin/main at 0a7d8ef5.
